item.title: Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 197)
item.description:
Welcome to the 197th edition in this series, let's do some good today. Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 196) https://imgur.com/gallery/8cXisGQ Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 195) https://imgur.com/gallery/CCZXP4o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 194) https://imgur.com/gallery/j8e1zRE Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 193) https://imgur.com/gallery/zUNZTnO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 192) https://imgur.com/gallery/ef4CV1o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 191) https://imgur.com/gallery/Cg6iteN Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 181-190) https://imgur.com/a/g3sTR0J Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 171-180) https://imgur.com/a/7OnodoA Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 161-170) https://imgur.com/a/3SfMNfg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 151-160) https://imgur.com/a/a3npRvx Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 100-150) https://imgur.com/a/rdkioD9 Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (First 100 days) https://imgur.com/a/SGVY2vD
Read that one again with me.
He's a great comedian I found because we both have Tourettes If you like standup check him out!
It's a week later We're still celebrating
Football player Travis Kelce's mom
My mom always being so supportive This is the final post on the last day of Puckett Week!
Lean on the people you love and you'll never be alone. ... This is the very last post of Puckett Week, what an experience. One last day to send household items to domestic violence survivors staying at The Mary Parrish Center. You can also donate $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday! To donate $18 to abuse survivors in honor of Nanna's 18th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send househokd supplies to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you all so much for upvoting the posts, donating to people in need and just being there for me when I need you most. The dogs and I will check back in when we're all settled again. Until then, be good to each other.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Dog learns to use the doggy door and she's very excited!!
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
hello
homie don't play that
looks like someone is a big Mickey Mouse/Walt Whitman fan
i would say just walk around naked. it worked for me
i want to tear that ketchup packet
i love dogs but a little one in my neighborhood never shuts up, especially when i walk by w goonie
mmm hmm
that boy ain't right
nope
as is tradition
checks out
oh i will anything
i could be talked into that
his living room is pretty small so this will fill up fast, better rsvp
i'd party with them
we've all done this
that's my time.. have a great night, gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Impossible to be mad at that face
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Come explore and abandoned school with me.
item.description:
This is the school. It's been shut down for three years.
Entry
Secretary's office
Principal's office
WTF why is this in the break room?
Half of the school had this weird setup. There is a central pillar with four classrooms around the pillar.
The walls don't go all the way to the ceiling and there are no doors in any entries.
Oh look another shooting target.
Second central pillar
Again with the target
Maybe we shouldn't make the classrooms look like a shooting range. Just a thought.
The library
I fucking loved Goosebumps!
What's down this way?
Oh, janitor's room
To enter the teacher's lounge you have to walk around a corner. This teddy bear almost made me shit my britches.
The fridge was still on but it smelled terrible.
Cafeteria
Kitchen
Art and music room
I found some cool art.
These were painted on old ceiling tiles
Found the gym
Go Greyhounds!
Some nice art outside the counselor's room
The aforementioned room
The counselor's office has a shower. Ok?
Lots of jerseys
Locker room
Who doesn't love a community shower? Complete with a chain link fence door.
I fucking loved these things!
These next few rooms were under the gym
And they were fucking creepy
I had to use my phone's flashlight to find the light switches.
As a grown ass man I wasn't scared of walking through a pitch black abandoned basement
I lied.
These rooms gave off a very unsettling vibe.
I was very jumpy.
Where did this go?
Here, apparently.
This door was locked.
But wait! Do you see what I see!
Keys! Sadly none of them worked on the locked door. I need to get in there! If I find a key I'll update y'all. Thanks for coming asking in the journey.
item.dc:creator: horstmac

item.title: Lol
item.description: Chago... May she never know what you did

item.title: Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Tuesday
item.description:
Welcome to the 238th installment in this series Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/yy0PCpP Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Wednesday https://imgur.com/gallery/t6ZW2l6 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/aUz0MVf Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Friday https://imgur.com/gallery/3Pso3BD Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/BVzmxMm Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Wednesday https://imgur.com/gallery/2kUnb2J Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your Monday https://imgur.com/gallery/AE8TIbF Day 221-230 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/B81rJcL Days 211-220 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/lwhZE43 Days 201-210 Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/fBko2Pg Fourth 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/Jtm8Lqz Third 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/XvE00DP Second 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/ewb2izC First 50 links - Here are 20 dog gifs that I hope brighten your day https://imgur.com/a/iqtNz8u
So graceful
Not so graceful
PJ vs The Tail part 96
My parents are meeting my dogs for the first time next month I'm super excited
The next clip has music that some might find annoying
The next clip is way louder than the previous ones
The next clip is louder than the previous ones
My 8 year old, 18 year old, 8 year old and 4 year old puppies The Pucketts ... Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 197) https://imgur.com/gallery/KgqlsIO ... Today is the final day of Puckett Week! One last day to send household items to domestic violence survivors staying at The Mary Parrish Center. You can also donate $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday! To donate $18 to abuse survivors in honor of Nanna's 18th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send househokd supplies to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you all so much for being a part of this, what an incredible week

item.title: It was my 11th cakeday, so here's some random stuff from my phone dump.
item.description:
Cat tax, as per the rules. I'm not about to get imgur audited!
More cat tax! I really hope those videos have sound, otherwise im gonna feel dumb. It's been an interesting 11 years. I've laughed, I've cried, I've recounted work stories and screamed into the void about medical bullshittery. You're all weirdos and I hope you all never change.
item.dc:creator: Hymeria

item.title: Canadians, I give you Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Non-Canadians: Mr. Singh is the leader of the NDP a democratic socialist party in Canada that currently holds the balance of power in a parliamentary minority government. He'd be considered a threat to The Flag and a socialist to the far left of Bernie Sanders in the USA, but he's actually a rationalist who wants order and good government. ETA: original link went sideways. I'll try to find it, but in the meantime: https://www.msn.com/en-ca/news/canada/jagmeet-singh-vs-galen-weston-the-ndp-s-crusade-to-bring-down-corporate-greed/ar-BB1iH4G6
item.dc:creator: beergeek

item.description: https://ko-fi.com/swordscomic
item.dc:creator: swordscomic

item.title: If nobody saw, did it happen?
item.description: A guy standing in line after me in the supermarket bought a single pack of instant noodles. At 9.30 pm. When leaving the store, I absolutely did NOT see him picking up some cabbage. Never happened. Must be some rare medical issue, where you go blind for just 3 seconds
item.dc:creator: jekath

item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Trying to get back in the swing of things
item.description: Hi guys, My name is Kit, and I used to skate pretty frequently. The winter weather, one of my extracurriculars, and my job got in the way of skating. Now things have kinda chilled out, so I'm hoping to get back into the swing of things. My ollies still suck, so that's something to work on. I also took this session to work on my kicturns and tic tacs. It's been a long year. My friend who got me into skating had to move away, I've been drowning in college applications, and I'm involved way too much at school. Things should be winding down now, so I can probably get back to skating. Sorry I've been gone. Smell ya later Imgur <3
item.dc:creator: KitSucksAtSkating

item.title: I designed this infographic (pt 2)
item.description: Reposting my repost because I was being lazy and using the version thats already been posted. I created the original of this (but we changed the cover, and for some reason I didn't put the final version on my computer). I'm amazed at how often its reposted, and it always makes me laugh because it was so boring to design. FYI I have nothing to do with the content on my infographics. Just design.
item.dc:creator: snidelid

item.title: Sen. Karen Berg explains fetal development to KY lawmakers.
item.description: Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/1b1bwlc/sen_karen_berg_explains_fetal_development_to_ky/ Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: Meme dump for my cake day (10 years!)
item.dc:creator: ankookna

item.title: Just fkn sick of it
item.description: I've been very poor all my life. I have never once had money for anything fun. I have gone without my entire life. I've been homeless and every month am terrified I will be again. It's always there, in my head haunting me. I've worked very hard all my life and always just barely got by. I'm now in my 40s and my body has given out. I ponder death daily. I don't have money to do laundry even. I wash my clothes with dollar store bar soap in the bathtub. And dry them on hangers. I've eaten food I found in trash cans, I've begged for scraps. I've spent my entire life broke af and nothing to show for it. I guess I'm a complete failure. But I've tried. Every day I do my best. My current housing situation is in limbo and there's a decent chance I'll be in the street again. And I gotta say.. I'll do myself in if that happens again. Homelessness is absolutely horrible in every way. I wonder what it's like to have money. It must be nice. Be grateful always. If you're homed and safe. If you have people that love you, clean clothes and a warm dinner please be grateful. The other side is fucking terrible. I have nothing. Not a damn thing. And just gets worse every day. I want to quit. I just want to quit. --Holy shit guys. I can't believe all the love and offers of help. I mean..wow. I really feel better because of you guys. Legit do. Thank you all for everything. I love you guys. I'm an introvert and am terrible at talking to people or asking for help. I kind of had a break down tonight and really was considering.. you know. The thing. Not anymore. I feel like maybe I do have a chance in the world and that's because of YOU guys. Fuck man.. thank you. I'm just... blown away. I always feel like everyone I meet hates me. It's just a natural reaction for me.. Right now I feel like.. I'm not sure how to describe it. Loved maybe? I dunno. Def a different feeling than the usual. 2: To everyone that has helped a poor nobody considering suicide.. Thank you!!!!! Fuck I can't believe the kindness and love from you guys... I'm just like.. wow. I don't really have words that can express how grateful I am. I freakin love you guys
item.dc:creator: TheWisdomCube

item.title: Irish Senate unanimously calls for arms embargo against Israel
item.description: https://www.democracynow.org/2024/2/27/headlines/irish_senate_votes_to_impose_sanctions_on_israel_prevent_us_arms_from_crossing_its_airspace Related: https://ottawasun.com/globe-newswire/breaking-another-city-joins-the-call-three-weapons-manufacturers-across-canada-are-now-blockaded-in-an-effort-to-stop-flow-of-weapons-to-israel https://thenationonlineng.net/thousands-demonstrate-in-spain-for-arms-embargo-on-israel/ Viral edit: For my fellow Canadians, I urge you to contact Parliamentary Members from your constituency and make your voices heard. You can do so from this page: https://www.ourcommons.ca/Members/en/constituencies Additionally you can contact Ministers/Members of Parliament whose roles can and should take more meaningful actions: Minister for Foreign Affairs: Hon. Melanie Joly, https://www.ourcommons.ca/members/en/constituencies/ahuntsic-cartierville(639) Standing Committee on International Trade: https://www.ourcommons.ca/Committees/en/CIIT/Members Standing Committee on Foreign Affairs and International Development https://www.ourcommons.ca/Committees/en/FAAE/Members Subcommittee on International Human Rights: https://www.ourcommons.ca/Committees/en/SDIR On top of all that please, sign one of the Canadian House of Commons Petitions: E-4766 https://www.ourcommons.ca/petitions/en/Petition/Details?Petition=e-4766 E-4788 https://www.ourcommons.ca/petitions/en/Petition/Details?Petition=e-4788 E-4802 https://www.ourcommons.ca/petitions/en/Petition/Details?Petition=e-4802 E-4745 https://www.ourcommons.ca/petitions/en/Petition/Details?Petition=e-4745
item.dc:creator: WoodyGoodman

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Wednesday meme dump
item.description:
1. Yeah it's Russia...
2. Be shocked? Also do you like mustard? It tastes kind of weird to me?
3. When you realize you're being filmed
4. Whatever wacky shenanigans these two are into, I am in
5
6. "Granny, you can't win a trick like that" Granny:
7. Why does this gif of food feels so dirty?
8. Chivalry...
9. Did this guy just cast a water spell?!
10. Me arriving late to a party
11. Scroll down to the list
12. I actually have seen like one or two of these. Are they really that scary?
13
14. Watch gators die inside. Turtle: "Guys, and then I ran fast! Like Usain Bolt!
15. Thank you for making it to the end of the dump! Now dance! P.S. Hope this dump entertained you, if you liked the humor, you might want to check out my "Stanley Parable" inspired game called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)". Wishlisting is the best way to support us small indie devs: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ THANK YOU!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
